explanation: The user wants all remote controls to be placed on a sofa. Since no remote controls are currently discussed or held, I first find each remote control (using Find), pick it up, navigate to the sofa (using Go_to), and place it on the sofa (using Place). The plan assumes there are at least two remote controls, identified as remotecontrol_0 and remotecontrol_1, with suffixes not used in the discussed_objects list. Each action is sequential and valid, ensuring only one object is held at a time and placement occurs only after pickup and movement.
